Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Special Interrogatories, Set Two
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Elizabeth K. Ryan, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Ben H. Lyon
James F. Hannawalt, Deputy City Attorney, for defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Ben Lyon's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents (set #1) and special interrogatories (set #2) is granted in part.
5, 12
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken.

7, 9, 23
Granted. The objections, other than based on Government Code Section 830.5 are overruled and stricken.

22
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce responsive documents from January 1, 2003 to September 23, 2006

28
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. If no documents exist, the response must comply with CCP Section 2031.220

interrogatories
81
Granted in part. The interrogatory is modified to only require a response for the period of September 23, 2003 to September 23, 2006.
Compliance by December 14, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Set For Trial On Apr-07-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-19-08 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 504
